# Guarding .Bar suppresses warning for .Bar.Name access.

check-templates -w
! stderr .

-- go.mod --
module example.com/app

go 1.25.0
-- main.go --
package main

import (
	"embed"
	"fmt"
	"html/template"
	"io"
)

var (
	//go:embed *.gohtml
	source embed.FS

	templates = template.Must(template.New("app").ParseFS(source, "*"))
)

type Bar struct {
	Name string
}

type Page struct {
	Bar *Bar
}

func render(p Page) {
	_ = templates.ExecuteTemplate(io.Discard, "index.gohtml", p)
}

var _ = fmt.Sprint

-- index.gohtml --
{{if .Bar}}
<p>{{.Bar.Name}}</p>
{{end}}
